title: There's a new way to land an internship at Millennium: be an AI superstar
excerpt: Introducing an AI internship track was "obviously a strategic decision" for Millennium, as the firm doubles down on young talent.
content_html:
By Alice Tecotzky

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

Millennium considers a select group of employees "change agents" — and they're not top portfolio managers or senior executives.

Instead, those tasked with transforming the firm from within are summer interns on a new AI track, a program that's part of a broader effort among top hedge funds to invest in young employees.

"Doubling down on early career talent and the age of AI is important," said Mallory Triano, Millennium's global head of campus recruiting. "It obviously was a strategic decision for Millennium to really focus on bringing those that have native AI fluency and innovation."

The new track is part of a broader expansion, as Millennium's internship program doubled to more than 200 people from 2023 to 2025. More than 70,000 students applied for this year's program, the most on record, and just 0.4% were accepted. Interns are placed on one of four pathways: quantitative, markets and products, business services, and engineering, with around one-third of the engineering group focused on AI.

While all interns are encouraged to use AI, Millennium decided to set up a dedicated track during internal conversations about the future of talent, Triano said. Other leading financial institutions, from big banks to rival hedge funds, have also said they want interns who are fluent in the technology, but most don't offer a dedicated AI pathway.

Triano said applicants distinguished themselves by talking about specific projects they've built with AI, how they use AI in their everyday lives, and problems they've solved with the technology. The firm wasn't just focused on technical talent but also on creativity and judgment, two traits many financial firms say they're looking for in the AI era (the head of campus recruitment at Citadel told Business Insider that the best intern applicants stand out for their judgment and adaptability).

Like all of Millennium's summer interns, the AI specialists are integrated into existing teams and operate similarly to junior employees, with access to the same AI tools. Triano said AI interns are expected to develop new ways to deploy the technology — that could mean finding new use cases, helping teams reimagine their workflows, or simply sparking conversations about the technology.

"They are not on the sidelines, they are on the frontlines with the business from day one," she said about interns generally. "They are receiving structured goals, structured projects, exposure to our senior leaders."

Next summer, Millennium is launching another new offering for hedge fund hopefuls: the investment internship for graduating college seniors. Between 20 and 30 students have already been selected and will be spread across three locations.

Securing an internship is one of the best ways to land a job at the notoriously competitive firm in a notoriously brutal market, Triano said, since the program is the "main pathway to full time analyst programs" for high-performers.

Read next

Alice Tecotzky

content_html_zh:
作者：Alice Tecotzky 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

Millennium 将一组经过挑选的员工视为“变革推动者”，而且他们不是顶级投资组合经理或高级管理人员。

相反，那些负责从内部改造公司的人是新人工智能项目的暑期实习生，该项目是顶级对冲基金投资年轻员工的更广泛努力的一部分。

Millennium 校园招聘全球主管 Mallory Triano 表示：“在人工智能时代，加倍重视早期职业人才非常重要。” “这显然是千禧年的一个战略决策，真正专注于引进那些拥有原生人工智能流畅性和创新能力的人。”

新课程是更广泛扩张的一部分，从 2023 年到 2025 年，Millennium 的实习计划人数翻了一番，达到 200 多人。 今年有超过 70,000 名学生申请了该项目，创历史最高纪录，但只有 0.4% 被录取。 实习生被安排在四个方向之一：定量、市场和产品、商业服务和工程，其中约三分之一的工程团队专注于人工智能。

特里亚诺说，虽然鼓励所有实习生使用人工智能，但千禧年决定在关于人才未来的内部对话中设立一个专门的轨道。 其他领先的金融机构，从大银行到竞争对手的对冲基金，也表示他们想要精通该技术的实习生，但大多数不提供专门的人工智能途径。

特里亚诺表示，申请者通过谈论他们用人工智能构建的具体项目、他们如何在日常生活中使用人工智能以及他们用该技术解决的问题来脱颖而出。 该公司不仅关注技术人才，还关注创造力和判断力，这是许多金融公司表示他们在人工智能时代寻找的两个特质（Citadel 校园招聘负责人告诉《商业内幕》，最好的实习生申请者因其判断力和适应能力而脱颖而出）。

与千禧年的所有暑期实习生一样，人工智能专家也被整合到现有团队中，并以与初级员工类似的方式运作，可以使用相同的人工智能工具。 特里亚诺表示，人工智能实习生预计将开发部署该技术的新方法，这可能意味着寻找新的用例，帮助团队重新构想他们的工作流程，或者只是引发有关该技术的对话。

“他们不是旁观者，从第一天起他们就站在业务的第一线，”她在谈到实习生时说道。 “他们正在接受结构化的目标、结构化的项目，并与我们的高层领导接触。”

明年夏天，千禧年将为对冲基金候选人推出另一项新服务：为即将毕业的大学毕业生提供投资实习机会。 20 至 30 名学生已被选中，并将分布在三个地点。

特里亚诺表示，在残酷的市场中，获得实习机会是在这家竞争激烈的公司找到工作的最佳途径之一，因为该项目是高绩效人才“通往全职分析师项目的主要途径”。

阅读下一篇
